title: paeonia daurica subsp. tomentosa
intro: Paeonia daurica subsp. tomentosa is a subspecies of peony, a flowering plant native to East Asia and the Russian Far East. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia daurica subsp. tomentosa include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and relieve pain.
